steps.title: Match the artist's action
steps.content: Gilliam later explored a different style involving quilt-like paintings. The blank needs a verb for what an artist does when working in a new style and producing paintings inspired by a tradition.

steps.title: Reject verbs that conflict
steps.content: A means forecasting, B means rejecting, and C means concealing; none fits an artist exploring a style. The remaining verb means making or producing the quilt-like paintings. The answer is D.
